characters.name: Chozen (character)
characters.description: Born, November 4 Tracy(sister) Phillip "Chozen Cullens is the focal character of the FX seriesChozen. He is a 28 year old white fat gay gangster rapper who is ten years out of touch with technology and pop-culture after living out a decade long prison sentence. In the Redband Trailer, Chozen's sisterTracyappears to call him "Phil," leading to speculation that his given name is Phillip. His mugshot placard bears the last name "Cullens."

characters.name: Phantasm
characters.description: Born, May 30 Phantasmis a character in the FX seriesChozen. He appears to be the reining top rapper in the Hip-Hop world, and therefore may be the target ofChozen's "beat the best to be the best" conquest.

characters.name: Tracy
characters.description: Born, March 21 Chozen(brother) Tracy Cullensis the college-age sister of title characterChozen. After his release from prison, Chozen moves in with Tracy, who is disgusted and embarrassed by nearly everything her brother says and does. The Redband Trailer appears to show Tracy calling Chozen "Phil," leading to speculation that Chozen's given name is Phillip. Her brother's mugshot placard bears the last name "Cullens," and it is therefore assumed this is her last name as well.
